log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist HP: 45/59
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 45/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 45/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 172/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 172/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist HP: 23/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
